title: Java and Stuff
description: an attempt to recreate the animation Pack actions and Stuff for Java Edition
body:
an attempt to recreate the recourcepack Actions and stuff for Java Edition with Mods and texture packs. This Modpack includes the textures and animations as similiar as possible. Now it's compitable with Shaders! (in Bedrock it doesn't)

Actions and Stuff is a popular recourcepack in the Bedrock Edition in Minecraft, which has custom textures, animations, ect. Many people tried to recreate it for Java and I am one of these.

Give it a try, maybe you'll like it.
